ogTitle: Ettalong Beach vs Ettrema: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ettalong Beach and Ettrema.
heading: Ettalong Beach vs Ettrema — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ettalong Beach, New South Wales and Ettrema, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ettalong Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Ettrema (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ettalong Beach or Ettrema safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ettalong Beach has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Ettrema scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ettalong Beach scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Ettrema scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ettalong Beach or Ettrema?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ettalong Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
